features: LASTING FRAGRANCE: Swirl In Wash Laundry Fragrance Booster, will add a long lasting clean Fresh Linen fragrance boost to your laundry. Suitable for all fabrics, colours , load sizes and washes. Single unit provides fragrance for 16 washes using the measuring cap provided

READY TO USE: Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, add crystals directly into the empty washing machine drum, add usual washing detergent, fabric conditioner if using and laundry booster, select preferred washing cycle. Enjoy the long lasting Fresh Linen fragrance in each laundry load
SLOW RELEASE: Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, developed to start releasing a clean Fresh Linen scent at the start of the wash. Choose the amount of crystals to increase the scent depth
LAUNDRY FRESH: Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, perfect to add to seasonal laundry before storing away. Great for freshening sleeping bags, bedding, towels and sportswear
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Swirl Laundry Fresh Linen Fragrance Booster, ready to use, 350g resealable container
description: Product Description Swirl In Wash Laundry Fragrance Booster, will add a long lasting clean Fresh Linen fragrance boost to your laundry. Suitable for all fabrics, colours , load sizes and washes. Single unit provides fragrance for 16 washes. Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, add crystals directly into the empty washing machine drum, add usual washing detergent, fabric conditioner if using and laundry booster, select preferred washing cycle. Enjoy the long lasting Fresh Linen fragrance in each laundry load. Perfect to add to seasonal laundry before storing away. Great for freshening sleeping bags, bedding, towels and sportswear. Shop Amazon.co.uk for the Swirl range of laundry products. Swirl Laundry Fresh Linen Fragrance Booster, ready to use, 350g resealable container Ingredients Parfum, Citronellol, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citral, Benzyl Salicylate, Eugenol Directions Add crystals directly into the empty washing machine drum, add usual washing detergent, fabric conditioner if using and laundry booster, select preferred washing cycle. Enjoy the long lasting Fresh Linen fragrance in each laundry load. See more
